title: COTTAM Block Brush (x2) | 5 Inch | For Paste Wallpaper Fence Deck Shed Slurry Masonry | General Purpose Large Paint Brush
features: The COTTAM Block brush – one of the most versatile brushes we have ever made. For painting walls, ceilings, decking, fences, sheds, to applying wallpaper paste or slurry and lots more in-between…. this one brush covers it all!
The 5 Inch (approx. 125 mm) ferrule is packed with tapered natural bristle which can be used in a variety of mediums from paint to paste.
The brush is comfortable to hold and has the added functionality of the brush rest - allowing the brush to be placed on a paint can, scuttle, bucket, or tray when not in use.
We encourage product re-use. Once cleaned and washed, the brush can be hung up to dry ready for the next time.
Our multipack listing offers two fantastic COTTAM Block Brushes in one great value pack
description: Product Description CATALOGUE PRODUCTS Our catalogue is packed full of great brush tools for a wide variety of tasks, covering a multitude of trades and markets. An array of brushes, ready for dispatch...
